description: Trading Execution System - Risk management engine, order execution service, trade lifecycle management, and position monitoring for volatility indices trading with MT5 integration

userStories.title: Set up risk management system foundation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to set up a risk management foundation to calculate position sizes, stop losses, and manage trading risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/services/risk_management.py module
Implement RiskManager class with configurable risk parameters
Set up risk parameter configuration (max risk per trade, max daily loss, etc.)
Implement risk validation before trade execution
Add risk logging and monitoring
Implement risk limit enforcement
Create unit tests for risk calculations
Add integration tests with trading scenarios
Document risk management rules and parameters
userStories.notes: Foundation for all risk management work

userStories.title: Implement position sizing algorithms
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to calculate optimal position sizes based on account balance and risk parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement fixed percentage risk (1-2% of account per trade)
Implement Kelly Criterion position sizing
Implement volatility-based position sizing (ATR-based)
Implement risk-reward ratio validation (min 1.5:1)
Implement position size calculation for MT5 lots
Add position size validation (min/max lot limits)
Implement position sizing based on account equity
Implement position scaling (pyramiding in/out)
Test position sizing on various account sizes
Validate position sizes match MT5 requirements
userStories.notes: Never risk more than 2% per trade

userStories.title: Implement stop loss and take profit calculation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to calculate optimal stop loss and take profit levels for each trade.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ATR-based stop loss (2x ATR)
Implement fixed pip stop loss (configurable)
Implement percentage-based stop loss (from entry price)
Implement support/resistance-based stop loss
Implement risk-reward based take profit (1.5x, 2x, 3x risk)
Implement trailing stop loss activation
Implement partial take profit levels (30%, 50%, 100%)
Implement time-based exit (max trade duration)
Add stop loss/take profit validation
Test stop loss calculations on historical data
userStories.notes: Stop loss is critical for risk management

userStories.title: Implement risk limits and circuit breakers
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to enforce risk limits and implement circuit breakers to prevent catastrophic losses.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement maximum daily loss limit (5% of account)
Implement maximum weekly loss limit (10% of account)
Implement maximum concurrent positions limit (3-5 trades)
Implement maximum correlation risk (no trades in same direction on correlated symbols)
Implement circuit breaker on consecutive losses (3 losses = pause trading)
Implement circuit breaker on large drawdown (>10% = pause trading)
Implement daily loss tracking and reset
Implement risk limit warnings (80%, 90%, 100% of limit)
Add risk limit breach logging and alerting
Test risk limits on various scenarios

userStories.title: Set up order execution service foundation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to set up an order execution service to place and manage orders through MT5.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/services/order_execution.py module
Implement OrderExecutionService class
Set up MT5 order placement integration
Implement order validation before submission
Add order status tracking
Implement order retry logic (3 attempts with exponential backoff)
Add order execution logging
Implement error handling for MT5 failures
Create unit tests for order execution
Add integration tests with MT5 terminal
userStories.notes: Foundation for all order execution work

userStories.title: Implement order placement and validation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to place validated orders through MT5 with proper error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement market order placement (buy/sell)
Implement order validation (symbol, volume, price, SL/TP)
Implement account balance check before order
Implement margin requirement check
Implement order request formatting for MT5
Add order result validation and parsing
Implement order rejection handling
Add order placement logging
Implement order confirmation tracking
Test order placement with paper trading

userStories.title: Implement order modification and cancellation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to modify and cancel orders through MT5 for active trade management.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement stop loss modification
Implement take profit modification
Implement trailing stop loss update
Implement order cancellation (pending orders)
Implement position partial close
Implement position full close
Add modification validation
Add modification logging
Implement modification retry logic
Test order modification with paper trading
userStories.notes: Active trade management requires order modification

userStories.title: Set up trade management system foundation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to set up a trade management system to monitor and manage open positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/services/trade_management.py module
Implement TradeManager class
Set up position monitoring loop (every 5 seconds)
Implement trade state management (pending, open, closed)
Add trade lifecycle tracking
Implement trade event generation
Add trade management logging
Create unit tests for trade management
Add integration tests with MT5 positions
Document trade management workflow
userStories.notes: Foundation for all trade management work

userStories.title: Implement position monitoring and updates
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to monitor open positions and update stop losses based on market conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement open position fetching from MT5
Implement position P&L calculation
Implement position duration tracking
Implement trailing stop loss activation (breakeven after 1.5x risk)
Implement trailing stop loss update (move SL every 0.5x risk)
Implement position health check (SL/TP distance from current price)
Add position monitoring alerts (large profit/loss)
Implement position status updates to frontend
Test position monitoring with live data
Validate position updates match MT5

userStories.title: Implement partial profit taking
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to implement partial profit taking to lock in gains while keeping position open.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement 30% position close at 1.5x risk
Implement 30% position close at 2x risk (move SL to breakeven)
Implement remaining 40% position close at 3x risk or trailing stop
Implement partial close logic for MT5
Add partial close logging
Implement partial close P&L tracking
Add partial close event generation
Test partial profit taking on historical data
Validate partial close calculations
userStories.notes: Partial profit taking locks in gains

userStories.title: Implement position scaling and pyramiding
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to implement position scaling (adding to winning positions) and pyramiding.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pyramiding logic (add to position after 1x risk profit)
Implement maximum pyramid positions (3 additions max)
Implement pyramid position size calculation (reduce size as price moves)
Implement pyramid stop loss management (move SL to breakeven)
Implement position scaling out (reduce size as profit increases)
Add pyramid validation (only on winning trades)
Add pyramid logging
Test pyramiding on historical data
Validate pyramid risk management

userStories.title: Implement emergency stop functionality
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to implement emergency stop functionality to halt all trading and close positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement emergency stop API endpoint
Implement immediate trading halt
Implement optional position closure on emergency stop
Implement emergency stop logging
Implement emergency stop notification
Add emergency stop reason tracking
Implement emergency stop recovery (manual restart required)
Add emergency stop testing
Document emergency stop procedure
Test emergency stop with paper trading

userStories.title: Implement trade history and analytics
userStories.description: As a trader, I need comprehensive trade history and analytics to evaluate trading performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement trade history storage in database
Fetch completed trades from MT5
Store trade details (entry, exit, P&L, duration, etc.)
Implement trade history API endpoint
Implement trade analytics (win rate, avg win/loss, profit factor)
Implement per-symbol trade statistics
Implement trade timeline visualization
Generate trade history reports (CSV/PDF)
Add trade filtering and search
Test trade history on historical data
userStories.notes: Trade history is essential for analysis

userStories.title: Implement correlation risk management
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to manage correlation risk between volatility indices to avoid overexposure.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement correlation calculation between symbols (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
Implement correlation matrix calculation (rolling 20-period)
Implement correlated position check (warn if >70% correlation)
Implement max exposure limit per correlated group
Implement position size reduction for correlated trades
Add correlation monitoring dashboard
Implement correlation-based position limits
Log correlation warnings
Test correlation management on historical data
Document correlation risk rules

userStories.title: Implement slippage and spread management
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to account for slippage and spread in trade execution and risk calculations.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement current spread fetching from MT5
Implement average spread calculation (rolling 100 ticks)
Implement slippage estimation (1-2 ticks)
Implement spread-aware position sizing (adjust for spread cost)
Implement spread filter (don't trade if spread > threshold)
Implement slippage-aware backtesting (include spread and slippage)
Add spread monitoring and alerting
Log spread and slippage for all trades
Test spread management on live data
Validate spread calculations match MT5
userStories.notes: Spread and slippage significantly impact returns

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must implement risk management with max 2% risk per trade
FR-2: System must calculate position sizes based on account equity
FR-3: System must place orders through MT5 with proper validation
FR-4: System must monitor open positions and update stop losses
FR-5: System must implement circuit breakers for risk limits
FR-6: System must support partial profit taking
FR-7: System must implement emergency stop functionality
FR-8: System must track trade history and analytics
FR-9: System must manage correlation risk between symbols
FR-10: System must account for slippage and spread in trading
nonGoals: No hedging strategies in this phase (future enhancement)
No options or derivatives trading (spot only)
No algorithmic order types (iceberg, TWAP) in this phase
No social trading or copy trading
technicalConsiderations: Risk management is the most important component of trading system
Never risk more than 2% per trade, 5% per day
MT5 connection can fail, implement retry logic
Slippage and spread significantly impact returns
Volatility indices are highly correlated (manage correlation risk)
Position sizing must account for leverage and margin
Trade history is essential for learning and improvement
Emergency stop must work reliably even if other systems fail
successMetrics: Risk management properly limits losses to 2% per trade
Circuit breakers trigger correctly on risk limit breaches
Position size calculations are accurate and validated
Stop loss and take profit levels are properly set
Trade management reduces risk on winning trades (trailing stop)
Partial profit taking locks in gains on >70% of trades
Emergency stop halts all trading within 1 second
Trade history captures 100% of completed trades

techStack.riskManagement: Custom risk calculations, pandas for analytics
techStack.orderExecution: MT5 order API with retry logic
techStack.database: SQLite for trade history and risk metrics

architecture.riskFlow: Signal → Risk Validation → Position Sizing → SL/TP Calculation → Order Placement
architecture.executionFlow: Order Request → Validation → MT5 Execution → Confirmation → Position Monitoring
architecture.managementFlow: Open Position → Monitoring → SL/TP Updates → Partial Close → Full Close
architecture.emergencyFlow: Emergency Stop → Halt Trading → Optional Position Closure → Logging → Notification

timeline.phase1: Foundation (Days 1-3): Risk management setup, position sizing, SL/TP
timeline.phase2: Order Execution (Days 4-7): Order placement, validation, modification
timeline.phase3: Trade Management (Days 8-11): Position monitoring, trailing stop, partial profit
timeline.phase4: Risk Controls (Days 12-14): Circuit breakers, correlation risk, emergency stop
